meaning: n.土壤,土地,国土,国家,温床,粪便,务农vt.弄脏,污辱vi.变脏
examples: Farmers grow rice in the rich soil.
Earthworms burrow deep into the soil.
If your soil is very acidic, add lime.
We came to a hummocky, undulating area of soil about 10sqm beside a gidgee tree.
Horsup jumped up and down on top of the soil, hoping to stir the creature below.
